name: Robin 100 LEDBeam

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F74CAC5F-1BEA-4195-8B75-F9E466A0B802

comment: A highly optimized motorised control produces speedy pan and tilt movement, three LED zones allow the creation of various colour chases, and the extra punchy 7 degree beam angle can be amplified with fast strobing.

capabilities.comment: Effect + rainbow speed slow to fast
Effect + rainbow speed fast to slow
Random Strobe slow to fast (random zone)
Random Strobe slow to fast (random zone + random strobe)
Random Strobe slow to fast (all zones)

modes.name: Mode 5 Three LED Zones at the end 16bit

gwSpecs.description: A highly optimized motorised control produces speedy pan and tilt movement, three LED zones allow the creation of various colour chases, and the extra punchy 7 degree beam angle can be amplified with fast strobing.
